name: statement-analysis
description: Deterministic profit-and-loss statement reporting table workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Build deterministic P&L statement reporting tables from CSV files.
interface.longDescription: Self-contained statement-table workflow for profit-and-loss or income statement datasets. It takes long-form source values and an explicit statement row recipe, validates the row calculation scheme, computes subtotal and total rows deterministically, and writes a compact grouped period/scenario table with context JSON and artifact manifest. The scripts do not make direct model API calls.
defaultPrompt: Use Statement Analysis on the P&L CSV file I provide.

Confirm or build the statement row scheme, run the deterministic P&L statement table package, write the table, context data and artifact manifest, then interpret the subtotal and total movements from the source data.
